dataset.name: Revocation
dataset.description: Records of carrier/broker/freight forwarder operating authorities that have been revoked by FMCSA. The Daily Difference variant includes only records that have been updated or added since the previous dataset run.
dataset.update_frequency: Daily by 9:30 AM US Eastern Time
dataset.scope: Includes records updated or added since the previous run. May also include related records for the same entity for completeness.

naming_convention.daily_difference: [Dataset Name] — contains only recently changed/added records
naming_convention.full_baseline: [Dataset Name] – All With History — contains all records including historical values

fields.name: Docket Number
fields.description: Unique FMCSA number identifying for-hire motor carriers

fields.name: USDOT Number
fields.description: Official FMCSA registration number for all interstate motor carriers

fields.name: Operating Authority Registration Type
fields.description: The type of operating authority that was revoked

fields.name: Serve Date
fields.description: Date the first revocation letter was sent to the entity

fields.name: Revocation Type
fields.description: The type of revocation action taken against the entity

record_relationships.primary_key: Docket Number + USDOT Number + Operating Authority Registration Type
record_relationships.notes: A single entity may have multiple revocation records if multiple authority types were revoked.

disclaimer: Data is provided as a public service by FMCSA for informational purposes only. It is a point-in-time snapshot and does not constitute legal advice or a legal contract.
